pi_items.source: export_result.sh checks draft/sent files for To: records@techcorp.com
verifier.py checks if subject contains 'archive' or 'organization'

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real emails from the SpamAssassin public corpus. The evaluation scripts strictly enforce the recipient 'records@techcorp.com', subject keywords containing 'archive' or 'organization', and a folder pattern of 'Archive-YYYY-MM'. While the verifier requires a minimum of 2 folders to be created to receive full points, an analysis of the first 50 emails loaded by setup_task.sh reveals a fatal defect in the task design: all 50 emails have Date headers from August 2002 (2002-08). Consequently, the agent can only sort emails into a single valid folder, making the 2-folder requirement logically impossible without creating empty dummy directories.
